economic_notes: Entities include solar energy partnerships (NFN Solar LP, Nipissing Solar SPN LP, Bineshii Projects LP), forestry (N'Bisling Forestry Inc.), community developments LP, and 1073059 Ontario Inc. Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust holds significant investment assets.
notes: Total revenue of $48,090,212 is operating revenue only and excludes Boundary Claim Trust investment income of $6,317,727 and unrealized loss on investments of $(13,592,252). ISC funding nearly doubled from prior year ($9.6M to $19.7M). The Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust is a significant consolidated entity with restricted assets of $87.6M. Accumulated remeasurement gains dropped from $16.2M to $2.6M due to unrealized investment losses. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $19,680,103 + MCSS $1,804,697 + OFNLP $1,253,067 + Ministry of Education $779,213 + Other provincial $2,569,753 + KEB $7,898,229 + UOI (treated as transfer) $1,184,225 + CMHC $514,231 - note UOI may be partially OSR. osr = Other revenue line $12,406,694 + portions of UOI not government. Simplified: osr = total revenue minus identified government transfers.
